# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent api gateway security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: https://user-service.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          hour: 1000
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_size: 1048576  # 1 MB
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - api_key

  - name: order-service
    url: https://order-service.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          hour: 2000
      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          max_size: 1048576  # 1 MB
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - api_key

routes:
  - name: user-route
    service: user-service
    paths:
      - /api/users
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://your-frontend.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization

  - name: order-route
    service: order-service
    paths:
      - /api/orders
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://your-frontend.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          allowed_headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization

plugins:
  - name: request-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Api-Key: "YOUR_SECURE_API_KEY"  # Use environment variables for sensitive data
      remove:
        headers:
          - X-Old-Header

  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - X-Response-Time: "{{$response_time}}"

  - name: jwt
    config:
      key: "YOUR_JWT_SECRET"  # Use environment variables for sensitive data
      algorithms:
        - HS256
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
        - nbf
        - iat

  - name: http-basic-auth
    config:
      users:
        - username: "admin"
          password: "YOUR_SECURE_PASSWORD"  # Use environment variables for sensitive data
